subject: Maximize the learning value of iThink and STELLA models
body:
Live Webinar series helps maximize the learning value of models

"Success with System Dynamics: Maximizing the learning value of 
iThink and STELLA models " will help you develop models to achieve 
greater impact

Instructor:
Jennifer Kemeny
Kemeny Consulting

Course Fee:
$199
$249 includes time-limited student license

Format:
4-session web seminar series

Enrollment:
Class size is limited to 50 to ensure instructor feedback and attention

About isee's New Online Course

"Success with System Dynamics: Maximizing the learning value of iThink
and STELLA models" is a four-session Web seminar series that guides you
through an integrated approach to modeling. If you’re a consultant,
educator, researcher, or other Systems Thinker looking to effectively
develop models that achieve greater impact, this course is for you!

Course instructor Jenny Kemeny will demonstrate the use of innovative
techniques gained through 20+ years experience integrating end-user
needs into the simulation process. In addition to real-life cases,
participants will have the opportunity to apply concepts to their own
modeling projects.

Web seminars will focus on specific topics according to the following
schedule:

Session 1: Defining the Learning Objectives
March 13, 2008, 1:00 PM EST

Session 2: Getting Results from Small Models
March 27, 2008, 1:00 PM EDT

Session 3: Developing a Custom Learning Model
April 10, 2008, 1:00 PM EDT

Session 4: Creating a Learning Experience
April 24, 2008, 1:00 PM EDT

"Success with System Dynamics" is taught by Jennifer Kemeny, a highly
respected and influential consultant in the organizational learning
field.  Jenny has worked with Sr. Executives in the world’s largest
organizations (including Royal Dutch Shell, FedEx, Proctor & Gamble,
Georgia Power, Arthur D. Little), as well as start-up companies,
educational institutions, hospitals, and non-profits.

To learn more, visit http://www.iseesystems.com/success
or email support@iseesystems.com

**********************************************************

To unsubscribe from the isee mailing list, please visit this link:
http://www.iseesystems.com/aspx/remove.aspx?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com
